wallet.chainsLabel: Chains (leave empty to track every server-configured chain)
wallet.chainsHint: If none are selected: every chain with an RPC configured in pasu-sync.toml is tracked.

settings.title: Settings — Server environment
settings.desc: The policy-server address the dashboard and the service worker will call. Leave empty to use the build default (PASU_SERVER_URL).
settings.savedNote: Saved — applied to the service worker immediately. The dashboard picks it up after a <reload>reload</reload>.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language for the dashboard UI.

profile.title: Profile
